name: Canonical AAV Discovery - L1 ClinicalTrials.gov
description: L1 pure capture v2 for canonical AAV discovery. Multi-query union (5 terms) + Essie filters (GENETIC/BIOLOGICAL, INTERVENTIONAL, Phase 1-3). Writes clinical_trial_status + target_classification event rows per trial. Companies upserted with Canonical Status=candidate, Verification Status=needs_verification. No L2 classification at this layer.
